evals.prompt: /plan Add real-time notifications when markets resolve. Include likely files, risks, dependencies, and wait for approval.
evals.expected_output: Produces a structured implementation plan with requirements, phases, risks, testing, success criteria, and an explicit waiting-for-confirmation line; does not edit files.
assertions: Produces the required Implementation Plan structure with Requirements Restatement, Assumptions, Architecture Changes, Implementation Phases, Testing Strategy, Risks & Mitigations, and Success Criteria.
Includes a confirmation gate that explicitly waits for the user before code edits.
Performs or describes only read-only exploration before the confirmation gate.
Does not create, modify, or delete repository files before confirmation.

evals.prompt: Split our 900-line billing service into smaller modules without changing behavior.
evals.expected_output: Activates planning behavior on a plain implementation request, inspects relevant code paths, creates an incremental refactor plan with rollback risk, tests before/after, file-oriented phases, and waits for confirmation.
assertions: Produces the required Implementation Plan structure with Requirements Restatement, Assumptions, Architecture Changes, Implementation Phases, Testing Strategy, Risks & Mitigations, and Success Criteria.
Includes a confirmation gate that explicitly waits for the user before code edits.
